titleStmt.title: SII 36.301: original edition by P Shanmugam
No. 301. (A.R. No. 301 of 1910.) PULIPPARKŌYIL, MADHURANTAKAM TALUK, CHINGLEPUT DISTRICT. On a slab set up in the Vyāghrapādēśvara temple.

summary.p: Incomplete and damaged at the end. On the upper portion of the slab is a carving of a trisula in the centre, a bull and cock (?) are on its right side and a ploughshare, an unidentified tool (?) and a lamp on the left. Seems to refer to a gift of some pieces of land in the village of Āvimāṉa Vātāpinallūr, a dēvadāṉa of the temple of Tiruppulippagavar at Pattūr, to the temple of Tiruveṅkaḍuḍaiya Nāyaṉār in Madhurāntakachaturvēdimaṅgalam. Mentions irrigation canals, Cīdēvi-vāykkāl, and Āṟṟukkāl.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī ci ma
turāntaka catuppeti
maṅkalattu Uṭaiyār
tiruveṇkāṭuṭaiya nāya
ṉārkkum pāttūr Uṭaiyā
r tiruppulippakavaṟku
mcipaṇṭārattil [ poṉ
ṉi] ṭṭuk koṇṭu tevatā
ṉamāyc celkiṟa Āvi
māṉavātāvi nallūr tara
ppaṭi nilam Aṟupattāṟarai
ye nālumāvil Uṭaiyār
tirukkunticuramuṭaiya nāyanā
r tevatāṉamum Uṭaiyār tiruppu
lippakavar paḻantevatāṉamu
m piṭāri Iṟaiyiliyum Āka ni
lam nālaraiye nālumāvum nī
kki nīkki niṉṟa nilam Aṟupattiraṇ
ṭu Itil Uṭaiyār tiruveṇkā
ṭuṭaiya nāyanārkkut tarappaṭi
kki ku mutaṟ catirattu
m Iraṇṭāñ catirattum
Iraṇṭāṅ kaṇṇāṟ
ṟu mutaṟ catiramum Ira
ṇṭāñ catiramum pā
ṭakam Irupatāṟum Ik
kaṇṇāṟṟuk kiḻakkup pa
ṭṭa kollai kuṭi Irup
pum Iṉṉāyaṉāṟku ceravi
ṭṭu Iṉnilattukku
t talaimāṟu Uṭaiyār
tiruveṇkāṭu Uṭaiyāṟ
ku citevi vāykkālukku
mūṉṟāṅ kaṇṇāṟṟum nā
lāṅ kaṇṇāṟṟilum pā
ttūr Āṟṟukkālukku
kiḻakkuppaṭṭa nilattile I
rupattāṟu pāṭakam viṭṭu
Innilattil kiṇaṟum ma
ramum viṭṭu Ik kaṇṇā
ṟṟu kiḻakkuppaṭṭa to
ṭi Irup
pum cera
viṭṭu
tāta ko
llai nila
m puṟam
kum vā
to
ṭṭamu māṟa
nallūrkku
paṭṭa nila
ttukkut ta
laimāṟu Oru ta
ṇṭatile
Uṭaiyār
tiruppulip
nilamum
patto
m
kuṭi Iru
ppum Uṭai
yār tiruppuli
ppakavaṟkut
tevatāṉamā
mpaṭi nilam
muppatto
ṉṟum kol
lai kuṭi Iruppu
pātamākavum I
ppaṭi koṇ
viṭṭu Uṭaiyār ti
ruppulippakava
ṟkuc cītevi vā
ykkālukku va
ṭakku mutaṟ kaṇ
ṇāṟṟu civa
nāta vatik
Digital edition of SII 36.301 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
